cot_prefix: Okay, let's try to figure out when David could have gone to the football field. Let me start by reading through all the information carefully. First, David woke up at 5am. Then there are several people who saw him doing different things at different times. Let me list out each person's sighting: - Steven saw David buying a phone from 5am to 6am. - Kimberly saw him taking photos near the Leaning Tower of Pisa from 6am to 8am. - Betty saw him working out at the gym from 9am to 12pm. - Lisa saw him driving to the water park from 12pm to 3pm. - William
